features: HIGH QUALITY CARD HOLDER: This gorgeous hard PU card protector helps to keep your credit, debit, and loyalty cards safe and organised, with concertina dividers. Both practical and appealing, it is made from protective solid plastic.
ASSORTED DESIGNS: There are three designs available, one will be chosen and supplied at random.
ALMOND BLOSSOM: A classic, artistic design taken from an original artwork by Vincent Van Gogh, this stunning design features a tree covered in blossom flowers.
CARD ORGANISER: This hard plastic cover makes an excellent protective case for keeping your cards safe whilst travelling, or wonderfully organised for everyday use.

ORIGINAL GIFT IDEA: A wonderful accessory for any recipient that has a love for nature, flowers or gallery artwork, and is a perfect present for a family member or special friend for their birthday, Christmas or any other occasion. This card holder is ideal for everyday use when kept in a handbag or pocket.
